seoTitle: Mount Madden vs Mount Melville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Madden and Mount Melville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Madden vs Mount Melville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Madden and Mount Melville.
heading: Mount Madden vs Mount Melville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Madden, Western Australia and Mount Melville, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Madden has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mount Melville (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Madden or Mount Melville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Madden has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Mount Melville scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Madden scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Melville scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Madden or Mount Melville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Madden has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
